# CIS Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (EKS) Benchmark v1.7.0 - Skills

This directory contains **46 SKILL.md files** for the CIS Amazon EKS Benchmark v1.7.0.

## Overview

- **Benchmark Version**: 1.7.0
- **Release Date**: 05-30-2025
- **Total Controls**: 46
- **Profile Levels**: Level 1 and Level 2

| 4.1     | RBAC and Service Accounts            | 8        |
| 4.2     | Pod Security Standards               | 5        |
| 4.3     | CNI Plugin                           | 2        |
